channel.title: Developer Tools on srvrlss.dev
channel.description: Recent content in Developer Tools on srvrlss.dev

item.title: Why AI Assistants Lose Context, and How to Work Around It
item.description: I hit the token wall with a thud. One minute, Claude was helping me untangle a gnarly codebase; the next, it was spitting out generic advice, as if it had forgotten everything we’d built up. I’d seen it before with Copilot and Gemini, too. Each time, the pattern was the same: a marathon session, vague prompts, too much pasted code, and a creeping sense of frustration as the model’s memory faded. If you’ve ever wondered why your AI assistant suddenly seems to lose the plot, you’re not alone—and you’re not the problem.
